info.description: A simple static site generator powered by Node.js, Webpack, and Browsersync.

features.list: Uses a templating language to create reusable html components.
Recursively searches for files to build and output pages.
Integrated page build process so pages hot-reload when changed for faster development.
Utilizes Webpack hot-reloading through Browsersync via middleware.
Utilizes custom Webpack configurations for asset management and optimization.

info.tools: Node.js, ES6 JavaScript, EJS, JSON, HTML5/Sass, Webpack, Browsersync
